name: Enchiladas Norteñas w/ Grilled Chicken & Queso Quesadilla
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique Queso Quesadilla Jalapeño cheese
1/4 cup Cacique Brand Cotija cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the grilled chicken and mix with the chopped cilantro.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet, and fry the tortillas until soft.
3. Dip each tortilla in the enchilada sauce, fill with the chicken, and roll.
4. Place the rolled tortillas side by side in a baking dish.
5. Top with remaining sauce and slices of Jalapeño cheese.
6. Bake in a 350º oven just long enough to melt the cheese.
7. Sprinkle with Cotija cheese and serve.
